✅ Result — the free SKRUSDT long we shared played out 👇

ID: SKR-L-20260628
Move from the entry zone to the high: +5.06% (spot) — tagging all three targets (TP1 0.00864 · TP2 0.00875 · TP3 0.00881).

Exactly the map: bounce off the 0.786 fib + rising trendline, straight back up the targets. SL was set at 0.00830 BEFORE entry — risk defined first.

That's the clean spot move on the chart — your leverage scales it from there. ⚠️ One idea that played out — not every setup does. Manage your own risk.
